title: crotalaria novae-hollandiae
intro: Crotalaria novae-hollandiae, also known as New Holland rattle pod or rattle bush, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and seeds of the plant have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to their health benefits, including antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria novae-hollandiae can be made in the form of teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues.
